headline: Morgan Stanley Highlights Equity Residential (EQR)’s Emerging Strength
summary: Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) is among the 14 Most Profitable Real Estate Stocks Right Now. On March 26, Morgan Stanley upgraded Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) from Equalweight to Overweight and lifted the price target to $74, up from $72. According to the firm, the company’s markets have shown greater resilience from a supply standpoint. Morgan Stanley anticipates […]
